price: Hat dieser (Gott) nicht die Macht, die Toten wieder lebendig zu machen?
arabic: أَلَيۡسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحۡـِۧيَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: alaysa dhālika biqādirin ʿalā an yuḥ'yiya al-mawtā
